en_flow_start.prompt: Your preferred language is english. Say 'yes' or 'no'

language_select.prompt: Language selection not implemented in english fallback.

english_menu.prompt: We offer the following services. you can say 'Subscribe' ,'Billing', 'Payment', 'Internet', 'Site Visit', or 'General Inquiries.'

payment_options.prompt: Would you like to make your payment using M-Pesa? Please say 'Yes' or 'No'.

airtel_money.prompt: Would you like to make your payment using Airtel Money? Please say 'Yes' or 'No'.

airtel.prompt: For Airtel Money, use our business name 'Unified Reach KE,' followed by your Unified Reach Fiber account number.

mpesa.prompt: To pay with M-Pesa, use Paybill number 5515216, followed by Unified Reach Fiber account number.

payment_billind_details.prompt: Want to check your billing details? You can use the MyUnified Reach app, visit our website, or simply dial *111#.

subscribe_fiber.prompt: Thanks for your interest in Unified Reach Fiber! Please hold while I connect you to a sales representative.

billing_info.prompt: For billing questions, please say your registered mobile number.

repeatmenu.prompt: For more services, you can say: 'Subscribe to Fiber,' 'Billing Inquiries', 'Payment Inquiries,' 'Internet Inquiries,' 'Site Visit Follow-Up,' 'General Inquiries,' or 'Repeat Menu.'

internet_inquiries.prompt: Please hold while I connect you to the next available representative.

general_inquiries.prompt: Thanks for choosing General Enquiries. You can ask about 'Shop Location,' 'Service Coverage,' or say 'Repeat Menu' to hear these options again.

shop_location.prompt: We've sent you a text with our shop location on your registered mobile number. Thank you.

service_coverage.prompt: We've sent you a text with our service coverage details. Thank you.

site_visit_follow_up.prompt: Please hold while I connect you to the next available representative.

connect_agent.prompt: I'm connecting you to an agent now. Please hold for just a moment.

thank_you.prompt: Thank you for choosing our services! Would you like any further assistance? Just say 'Yes' or 'No.'

thank_you_end.prompt: Thank you for choosing our services. We truly appreciate you, and we hope you have a wonderful day!
